exact_answer: Cushing Disease is specifically caused by excess ACTH secretion from a pituitary source, while Cushing Syndrome is the broader condition of pathologic hypercortisolism from any cause
Cushing's disease refers to a pituitary source of excess ACTH, whereas Cushing's syndrome encompasses all causes of endogenous hypercortisolism
Cushing's disease is the pituitary-dependent subtype (70% of cases), while Cushing's syndrome includes adrenal tumors and ectopic ACTH sources as well
